network.title: No Internet Connection
network.message:
Your device isn't connected to the internet.
Check your Wi-Fi or mobile data and try again.

server.title: Something Went Wrong
server.message:
Our servers ran into an issue.
Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No Data Found
empty.message:
We couldn’t find anything here.
Try again later.

distance_not_found.title: No Distance Available
distance_not_found.message:
The distance information for this event is currently not available.
Check back later for updates..

participant_not_found.title: Participant Not Available For This Event
participant_not_found.message:
We couldn't find this participant in the event right now.
They may not have registered or data isn't available yet.

not_found_in_race_result.title: No Race Results
not_found_in_race_result.message: No results were recorded for this event.

no_data.title: Nothing Here Yet
no_data.message:
There's no data to show right now.
Try again later.

record_not_found.title: Not Found
record_not_found.message: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

payment_failed.title: Payment Failed
payment_failed.message:
Your payment could not be processed.
Please try again.

registration_closed.title: Registration Closed
registration_closed.message: Registration for this event has closed.

session_expired.title: Session Expired
session_expired.message: Please log in again to continue.

permission_denied.title: Access Denied
permission_denied.message: You don't have permission to view this.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message:
We're improving things.
Check back shortly.
